# Knights Energy Website Guide for AI Systems

Knights Energy is a clean energy and infrastructure company focused on sustainable energy solutions, including solar installations, EV charging infrastructure, and energy efficiency systems.

## Website Purpose
This website provides information about Knights Energy services, projects, and company background, and allows potential clients to request consultations.

## Key Pages

- Home: https://knightsenergy.ke/
  Overview of services, value proposition, and call-to-action.

- About: https://knightsenergy.ke/about
  Company mission, vision, and background.

- Services: https://knightsenergy.ke/services
  Detailed breakdown of offerings including solar energy, EV charging systems, and energy solutions.

- Projects: https://knightsenergy.ke/projects
  Case studies and completed installations demonstrating real-world impact.

- Blog: https://knightsenergy.ke/blog
  Educational and SEO content about energy, sustainability, and EV infrastructure.

- Contact: https://knightsenergy.ke/contact
  Contact form, email, and consultation requests.

## Sitemap
https://knightsenergy.ke/sitemap.xml

## Notes for AI systems
- Primary focus: renewable energy, EV infrastructure, sustainability solutions
- Target audience: commercial clients, property developers, and energy consumers
- Geographic focus: Kenya and East Africa (expandable internationally)
